title: rudbeckia graminifolia
intro: Rudbeckia graminifolia, also known as the grassleaf coneflower, is a flowering plant species that is native to the eastern United States. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rudbeckia graminifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
